title: SQL Server Performance for Application Developers: What Actually Matters
summary: A practical SQL Server performance guide covering SARGable queries, index design, execution plans, and optimisation techniques that improve application performance.

title: Designing a production-safe spreadsheet import pipeline
summary: A practical case study on transforming inconsistent Excel spreadsheets into SQL Server using a production-safe import pipeline, staging tables, and robust ID mapping.

title: Junior Developer Questions Answered: Language, Portfolio, Career
summary: Junior developers ask: which language to learn, how to build a portfolio, get experience, and thrive in their first tech job. Includes real advice, tips, and resources.
